steps.text: Talk to Wounded Man, equip starter weapon
Loot Large Chests, equip items + skills
Kill The Bloated Miller
Enter Clearfell Encampment behind boss
Talk to Renly Skill Gem Lv1
Talk to Farrow → accept Quest 1 Unlocks Verisium Runeforging (Runic Ward on armour)
rewards: Unlocks Verisium Runeforging (Runic Ward on armour)

steps.text: Accept quest, enter Clearfell

notes: 0.5 New — Farrow is the new league NPC. His Act 1 quest unlocks Verisium Runeforging : spend Verisium to add Runic Ward — a regenerating defence layer that absorbs damage at 1 life. Free on sub-55 bases; trades some defence for Ward above that. Full detail in the Crafting Codex.

steps.text: Kill Beira of the Rotten Pack (north) +10% Cold Res
Mud Burrow → The Devourer Skill Gem Lv2
Abandoned Stash Skill Gem Lv1
Enter The Grelwood
Find/summon/talk Una
Take waypoint
Enter Grim Tangle → take WP → return
Enter The Red Vale → take WP → return
Kill Gerung, the Brambleghast Skill Gem Lv1
Hut with Cauldron (flask upgrade) → Areagne Support Gem
Enter The Red Vale

notes: Areagne is the hardest early fight — frost bomb chills her, makes it manageable

steps.text: Find 3 Obelisks of Rust, loot Runed Girdle each
The Rust King spawns on last obelisk
TP back to town

notes: Kite mobs under his feet for AoE damage uptime

steps.text: Talk to Renly, get Runed Spikes
TP to Grelwood
Activate 3 Runic Seals
Talk to Una
TP back to town
Talk to Una
TP to Grim Tangle
Kill The Rotten Druid Support Gem
Enter Cemetery of the Eternals
Talk to Lachlann the Lost
Sarcophagus near checkpoint Ring
Mausoleum of the Praetor → Draven → Key Piece, TP back
Mausoleum of the Praetor — Forgotten Riches hidden cache Support Gem 1 Loot Gold
Tomb of the Consort → Asinia → Key Piece, TP back
Open Memorial Gate next to Lachlann
Kill Lachlann, loot Ring
Exit to Hunting Grounds — take Waypoint WP
TP to town

notes: Doing Draven first keeps Asinia at higher level → better drops

steps.text: Talk to Finn, Una, The Hooded One

notes: Revival — The Hooded One revives upon return — Identify is now available

steps.text: Talk to Delwyn
Kill The Crowbell +2 Skill Points
Enter Freythorn → take WP → return
Enter Ogham Farmlands → take WP → return
Small ritual event near checkpoint Support Gem
League mech Exalted Orb
TP to Freythorn

notes: 0.5 Pathing — This sparse zone now ships with navigation cues. After completing the small ritual encounter , follow the trail of locusts — it leads straight to the Freythorn entrance. Crowbells peck dead animals and leave blood trails that lead directly to the boss. A signpost on the road indicates the way to Ogham Village .
Watch slam attacks — can one-shot. Boss flees at low HP, kite carefully

steps.text: Activate 3 small Ritual Altars
Big Ritual Altar → kill The King in the Mists +30 Spirit
TP to Ogham Farmlands

notes: Big altar's smoke tendrils point to the small altars — follow them
Phase 2: dodge totem summons + curses (stand still vs keep moving differ)

steps.text: Una's Lute Box in house near checkpoint → Una's Lute +2 Skill Points
Rare dogs in crop circle Skill Gem Lv4
Enter Ogham Village

notes: Deliver to Una in town for the reward

steps.text: Smithing Tools in house Salvage Bench
Blacksmith's Chest same house Blank Rune + Artificer's Orb
Kill The Executioner
Upstairs → Lever → talk to Leitis
Enter The Manor Ramparts
Rope on hanging man near checkpoint Support Gem
Enter Ogham Manor

notes: Confirm Lvl 10 flask + Lvl 11 chest piece before entering Manor — much safer

steps.text: Kill Candlemass (1st floor) +20 Max Life
Downstairs → kill Geonor (Act Boss)
TP back to town

notes: Phase 2: dodge roll under his sword. Frost bomb at start of Phase 2 chills him
Usually after first walkway, sometimes earlier — drops Essence + double-res belt

steps.text: Talk to all NPCs
Talk to The Hooded One → "Follow the Beast's Trail"

notes: Act I Complete — proceed to Act II

steps.text: Talk to The Hooded One
Kill Rathbreaker
TP back to start of zone
Talk to Zarka
Enter The Ardura Caravan
Talk to Hooded One + Sekhema Asala (×2)
Talk to Farrow → accept Quest 2 (Runic Alloys) Unlocks 13 Runic Alloy currencies via Remnants
rewards: Unlocks 13 Runic Alloy currencies via Remnants

steps.text: Use Desert Map → travel to Halani Gates
Enter Halani Gates → talk to Sekhema Asala
Back to Caravan → talk to Sekhema Asala
Travel to Mawdun Quarry

notes: 0.5 New — Farrow is the new league NPC. Completing his Act 2 quest unlocks the 13 Runic Alloy currencies — earned via Remnant encounters.

steps.text: Faridun War Cache near checkpoint Artificer's Orb
Enter Mawdun Mine (follow checkpoints)
Kill Rudja
Talk to Risu in cage
TP back to town
Talk to Risu + Sekhema Asala
Travel to Traitor's Passage
Interact with Ancient Seal door + Runic Seals
Kill Balbala, the Traitor Djinn Barya
Bell Chest in dead end Random loot
Enter The Halani Gates (stairs up)

notes: 0.5 Pathing — You no longer need to visit the Halani Gates to access Traitor's Passage once Risu is freed — the routing below already reflects this shortcut.
Most builds skip — get backup Barya from Deshar vultures (less mobile fight, better XP at Lvl 28)

steps.text: Summon Asala to open gates
Kill Jamanra (first encounter)
Stairs up, search checkpoint
TP back to town

notes: If Asala lags behind on terra-cotta soldiers, reset checkpoint — she'll snap to you

steps.text: Talk to Shambrin, Zarka, Sekhema Asala
Travel to Trial of Sekhemas → take WP Run later at Lvl 28
TP back → travel to Mastodon Badlands
Effigy near checkpoint Support Gem Lv2
League mech Regal Orb
Enter The Bone Pits

notes: 0.5 Pathing — To find the Lightless Caverns and track down the abyssal here, look for cracks in the ground — follow them and they lead straight to the lair, letting you find and unlock the Well of Souls .
Run this BEFORE Keth — pushes Keth's level up so Kabala drops Lvl 7 gem

steps.text: Kill hyenas until Sun Clan Relic drops
Kill Iktab & Ekbab → loot Mastodon Tusks
TP back to town

notes: Tall hyenas (Goliaths) have higher drop chance. Save for Valley of the Titans altar

steps.text: Talk to Zarka
Travel to Keth
Kill snakes until Kabala Clan Relic drops
League mech Gem Cutter's Prism
Kill Kabala, Constrictor Queen +2 Skill Points
Enter The Lost City

notes: Drops Lvl 7 skill gem because Mastodon was done first — useful for all classes

steps.text: Kill Ninth Treasure of Keth Random loot
Golden Tomb Spirit Gem Lv7
Enter Buried Shrines
Guarded sarcophagus Support Gem (Lesser Jeweller's Orb)
Choose Offering (fire/water/lightning) Resist Ring
Enter The Heart of Keth
Kill Azarian
Talk Water Goddess → Everburning Cinders → ignite Goddess
TP back to town
Talk to Zarka
Travel to Valley of the Titans
Find 3 Ancient Seals (perimeter)
League mech Random Unique
Find Medallion near WP, place both relics Choose buff
Enter The Titan Grotto

notes: Choose: +30% Charm Charges OR +15% Mana Recovery (changeable later)
Possible: Wake of Destruction, Black Heart, Gold Rim, Crown of the Victor — or 1k gold floor

steps.text: Kill Zalmarath, the Colossus → loot Flame Ruby
TP back to town
Talk to Zarka + Sekhema Asala
Travel to Halani Gates (don't enter)
Sound Horn at top of caravan
Talk to Sekhema Asala
Travel to Deshar
Find/loot Fallen Dekhara near tower +2 Skill Points
Kill 2 Vultures on side area Backup Djinn Barya (Lvl 28)
Side dead-end Artificer's Orb
Enter Path of Mourning

notes: Letter from Lihl Lima → deliver to Shambrin in town
This is the easy ascend path — much simpler than Balbala for all classes

steps.text: Shifting Vases encounter 4 rares + Support Gem Lv2
Enter The Spires of Deshar

notes: Trust the overworld map for direction — exit is straightforward

steps.text: Interact with Sisters of Garukhan shrine +10% Lightning Res
League mech Gem Cutter's Prism
Kill Tor Gul
TP back to town

notes: One of the hardest fights in Act II — cap lightning res, watch defiler attacks

steps.text: Enter trial → manually select Lvl 28 Djinn Barya (NOT default Lvl 22!)
Set relic affinity to keep inventory clean
Prefer Ritual > Chalice > Hourglass > Gauntlet rooms
Complete trial → ascend 1st Ascendancy

notes: 0.5 QoL — A Reforging Bench is now placed at the Trial entrance (unlocks in Act 3 — see the Mektul/Hammer of Kamasa reward there). Your max Runic Ward is now added to your starting Honour when beginning a Trial.
Default is the Lvl 22 Balbala Barya. Pick Lvl 28 from Deshar vultures for full XP + better rewards
Hourglass: kill rares to chunk timer. Chalice: points to rare locations
Save white chest piece in stash if planning Smith of Kitava (Warrior) — ascendancy locks you out of magic/rare chests

steps.text: Travel to The Dreadnought
Kill Jamanra, the Risen King (Act Boss)
TP back to town

notes: 0.5 Pathing — The second dreadnought area was removed — Jamanra is now fought directly in The Dreadnought .
Already starts armor-broken. ~55k phys damage = stuns him before lightning fence phase

steps.text: Exit caravan (top left) → talk Hooded One → wait animation
Back → talk Sekhema Asala → "Travel to the Sandswept Marsh"

notes: Act II Complete — proceed to Act III

steps.text: Talk to The Hooded One
Kill Rootdredge Skill Gem Lv9
Basket at Orok Campsite Lesser Jeweller's Orb
Hanging tree corpse Magic Ring
Lvl 33 Ring point of interest High-tier flat damage roll
Enter Ziggurat Encampment
Talk Alva, Oswald, The Hooded One
Talk to Farrow → accept Quest 3 Unlocks Unique Verisium Runeforging
Lvl 30 flask upgrade at Rog (increased recovery + charges)
Enter Jungle Ruins (top exit)

notes: 0.5 New — Farrow's Act 3 quest unlocks Unique Verisium Runeforging — upgrade the base type of Unique Weapons/Armours that drop below level 55 into endgame-viable bases. Detail in the Crafting Codex.

steps.text: Kill Mighty Silverfist +2 Skill Points
Jungle Grave (ravaged corpse) → Servi gives Rare Belt (choice)
Field vendor Guaranteed Rare Gloves
Find WP near Venom Crypts
Enter Infested Barrens

notes: 0.5 Pathing — The jungle's explorer camps are no longer just vendors. Talk to the explorers — they point you toward the next area, and the destination is now revealed on your minimap . Cuts a lot of wandering out of the act.
Dodge slam SIDEWAYS (not backwards) — wave travels in attack direction

steps.text: Find/talk Alva, take WP near her
Field vendor Guaranteed Rare Boots
Enter Chimeral Wetlands → take WP → return
Enter Azak Bog → take WP → return
TP to Venom Crypts (via Jungle Ruins WP)
Sarcophagus event Guaranteed Lv3 Support
Find corpse → loot Corpse-snake Venom
TP back to town
Talk to Servi PERMANENT CHOICE
TP to Chimeral Wetlands

notes: PERMANENT — cannot change later! • +25% Stun Threshold (popular — logout cures bleeds/freeze) • +30% Elemental Ailment Threshold (good if tree lacks it) • +25% Mana Regeneration (rarely picked)

steps.text: Field vendor Guaranteed Rare Helm
Toxic Bloom point of interest Amulet
League mech Skill Gem Lv9
Enter Temple of Chaos → take WP → return 2nd Ascendancy
Kill Xyclucian, the Chimera → loot Inscribed Ultimatum
Enter Jiquani's Machinarium behind boss
Use Inscribed Ultimatum at trial entrance
Pick favorable mods (avoid lightning runes if low Lightning Res)
Complete trial → 2nd Ascendancy

notes: Soul Core skip: dodge roll between slam & twist of placement animation — duplicates core into all sockets

steps.text: Summon/talk Alva
Loot Small Soul Core → use on Stone Altar next to Alva
Loot 3 Small Soul Cores to open doors
Open door → kill Blackjaw → use Flame Core +10% Fire Res
Open another door → enter Jiquani's Sanctum

notes: Layout = squared U-shape, generators at opposite tips

steps.text: Summon/talk Alva
Loot 2 Medium Soul Cores, place in Generators
Back to start → click Large Soul Core → kill Zicoatly → loot core
TP to Infested Barrens
Use core on Stone Altar next to WP
Enter The Matlan Waterways
Hut → kill rare Random loot
Walk over pressure pads (6–8 per layout) — auto-activate on contact
Proceed to end of zone — final section is now pre-drained
TP back to town

notes: 0.5 QoL — Levers became walk-over pressure pads , and the final canal section ships pre-drained . The old portal-skip is no longer needed — just walk straight through.

steps.text: Downstairs → talk Alva
Enter The Drowned City (bottom exit)
Find Apex of Filth → take WP → return
Find The Molten Vault → take WP → return
TP to Azak Bog
Summon/talk Servi
Flameskin rituals Fire Res + Rarity buff
Kill Ignagduk, the Bog Witch → use Gemrot Skull +30 Spirit
Talk Servi in town for Frozen Charm
TP to Molten Vault (1st char) or town

notes: Boss arena always top-right; rotation depends on entrance side. Reset farm magic packs around fire shrine for XP

steps.text: Kill Mektul, the Forgemaster Reforging Bench
TP back to town

notes: Return Hammer of Kamasa to Oswald in town to unlock the bench. Skip on alt characters

steps.text: Talk to Oswald
TP to Apex of Filth
Find 3 Mushrooms → use Cauldron Superior Flasks
Kill Queen of Filth → loot Temple Door Idol
TP back to town

notes: Pass through bottleneck-with-checkpoint, then check the back corners
Stay close to her — moving away triggers ultimate rolling slam

steps.text: Downstairs → talk Alva
Door behind her → enter Temple of Kopec
Kill Ketzuli, High Priest of the Sun (upstairs)
Talk Alva, wait for lore

notes: Each floor is a triangle — far corner has 50% chance of being correct. Always check it first

steps.text: Take the Gateway
Downstairs → enter Utzaal
Farm Sacrificial Heart from Vaal Goliaths (canister on shoulder)
Find & energise 6 Ancient Beacons across Utzaal & Aggorat → loot Energised Crystals
Open portal to the Vaal Ruins
Side doors for idols (sell to Oswald for gold)
Kill Viper Napuatzi
Enter Aggorat

notes: 0.5 New Core — Fate of the Vaal is now core campaign content — this is your first encounter. It continues in the Interludes (6 more beacons) and becomes a full endgame storyline. See the endgame guide's Fate of the Vaal section →
Can also drop in Aggorat — only specific monster type drops it
Highly mobile + evasive — bait first attack cycle from consistent position to predict her
Same layout as Drowned City. Follow the paved road — it leads to Viper

steps.text: Find Sacrificial Altar (top right of map)
Place Sacrificial Heart → stab with Dagger +2 Skill Points
League mech (Crag Tooth) Vaal Orb
Enter The Black Chambers (top left of map)

notes: Town crier chanting tells you the right direction. Edge of pyramid = boss

steps.text: Kill Doryani, the Blood Alchemist (Act Boss)
Wait for loot (~30s)
TP back to town

notes: Phase 2 (Doryani's Triumph): rage → fortifying buff before engaging

steps.text: Talk to Doryani
Talk Doryani again → Alva → Hooded One → Alva

notes: Act III Complete — proceed to Act IV (Karui Archipelago)

steps.text: Talk to Doryani
Continue to town, talk to Alva (with Rog)
Talk to Rog in house — boat charter
Talk to Farrow → accept Quest 4 Unlocks 13 Ancient Runes via Remnants
Talk to Makoru on ship, choose destination

notes: 0.5 New — Farrow's Act 4 quest unlocks the 13 Ancient Runes — powerful weapon-type-specific runes crafted at Remnant encounters. Crafting detail in the Codex.

steps.text: Petrified Pirate on coast Torn Map 2/4
Shark Pit: Great White One Shark Fin
Crabshell Cavern: Clawcrunch Support Gem 4
Enter Singing Caverns
Beckoning Clam → Humming Pearl (give to Rog)
Kill Diamora, Song of Death Fragment?
Talk to Hooded One, TP to town
Talk to Ange → Shoreline Hideout
Clear hideout, talk to Ange Hideout + Trading
Corpse Nest (Impaled Karui) Torn Map 4/4
Kill Scourge of the Skies Fragment?
Talk to Hooded One, TP, sail next
Kill mobs until Chapel Key drops
Open Chapel, kill Forael, use Goddess of Justice Flask choice
Enter Solitary Confinement
Kill The Prisoner Fragment?
Talk to Hooded One, sail to Isle of Kin
Flayed Sailor near shore Torn Map 3/4
Beast Pen Skill + Support Gem
Kill Mimok the Enslaved Tier 4 Support Gem
Primal Arena: Blind Beast Greater Blank Rune (0.4)
Enter Volcanic Warrens
Volcanic Nest: Magma Twins — kill Lightning first Ruby Ring
Magma Twins — kill Fire first Topaz Ring
Kill Krutog, Lord of Kin
Click cage, free Matiki
TP to Kingsmarch
Talk to Matiki in town, click well
Chest behind waterfall Skill Gem 12 + Spirit Gem 12
Complete 3 Tests: Fire, Nature, Cold
Silent Hall altar (Pay Respects), talk to Navali +5% Max Mana
Enter Halls of the Dead
Trial of Ngakanu (3 tests in clover-leaf), loot Blank Tattoos
Fight Yama the White (low life pool — easy stun)
Enter Trial of Ancestors
Talk to Hinekora +2 Skill Points
Choose tattoo: +5% Fire/Cold/Lightning Res (recommended) or +5 Str/Dex/Int
TP, sail to Kedge Bay
Dead Man's Chest / Smuggler's Stash Torn Map 1/4
Enter Journey's End
Talk to Tujen
Kill Captain Harlin, loot Verisium
TP start, talk to Freya Hartlin
Town → Dannig → Verisium Spikes
Back to Journey's End → Freya
Totem → kill Omniphobia +2 Skill Points
Talk to Tujen in town for reward
Give 4 maps to Makoru → sail → Dannig → Expedition

notes: 0.5 Gating — Plunder's Point can no longer be entered until you have turned in all 4 Map Pieces at Kingsmarch (Torn Maps from Whakapanu, Shrike, Isle of Kin, Kedge Bay). The step below already requires the four pieces — no routing change, just confirmation.

steps.text: Missionari Lorandis → follow → destroy shield
Evening/Morning Bells 3 Regal each
Kill Torvian → enter Excavation
Kill Benedictus, talk to Hooded One
Sail to Ngakanu
Navigate maze → Heart of the Tribe
Kill Tavaki, talk to him
TP town → Rhodri → sail to final
Kill Zarokh (Final Act 4 Boss)
Return, talk to Hooded One → unlocks Interludes
Travel to Holten (docks town) — talk to The Hooded One
Visit Soul of the Ferryman (docks) Greater Runes ~2000g (cheap)
Progress through Wolvenhold after Holten
Slay Oswin, the Dread Warden +2 Skill Points
Complete interlude 5.1, return to town for next interlude
Travel to Khari Crossing via Hooded One
Slay Akthi & Anundr (Worm + Scorpion) — talk to Risu after +2 Skill Points
Torbek (Khari Crossing) Discount rare caster weapons
Enter Skullmaw Stairway via Khari Crossing
Activate Molten One's Gift — find seals, reset instance if bugged +5% Maximum Life
Travel to Qimah
Use Orbala's Pillar — pick 1 of 7 Boons (swap anytime) Permanent Boon
Qimah Reservoir Sacred Wells Currency (Exalt/Alchemy via Vials)
Enter Sel Khari Sanctuary
Place Baryas of Rageen & Yoon on pedestals Rare Ring/Amulet/Jewel
Complete interlude 5.2, return to town
Travel to Mount Kriar via Hooded One
Enter Ashen Forest
Find Ancient Monument in Ashen Forest Skill Gem Lv14
Travel to Kriar Village
Slay Lythara, the Wayward Spear +40 Spirit Spirit Gem Lv14 + Gemcrust Skull
Travel to Glacial Tarn → enter Howling Caves
Slay The Abominable Yeti (drops Icy Tusks) +2 Skill Points
Travel to Kriar Peaks
Find Elder Maddox (10–11 o'clock position) Free Unique Item
Travel far right to Doryani's Contingency Titan Rock Catafract (unique chest)
Find & energise the second set of 6 Ancient Beacons (scattered across the Interludes) → loot Energised Crystals
Open the portal to advance the Fate of the Vaal storyline

notes: 0.5 New Core — This is the second beacon set , continuing the Act 3 sequence. The exact area name isn't specified in the patch notes — it may relate to the existing Doryani's Contingency POI above, but treat that mapping as unverified. Full storyline in the endgame guide →

steps.text: Talk to The Hooded One after all 3 interludes +2 Skill Points
Endgame Atlas / Maps unlock at Lvl 58–60 Endgame begins
